title: Archive Management
description: Creating distribution archives (zip, tar, tar.gz, tar.bz2) of Composer packages via the CLI `composer archive` command.

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Runs `composer archive` from the CLI to create a package distribution archive

actors.name: EventDispatcher
actors.description: Fires PRE_ARCHIVE_CMD and POST_ARCHIVE_CMD script events around the archiving process

actors.name: DownloadManager
actors.description: Downloads and installs remote package sources into a temp directory before archiving

use_cases.name: Archive Current Project
use_cases.description: Developer runs `composer archive` without a package argument; archives the root package
steps: ArchiveCommand::execute() resolves format/dir from CLI options or config
ArchiveCommand::archive() obtains ArchiveManager from Composer or creates one via Factory
ArchiveManager::archive() detects RootPackageInterface → uses realpath('.') as source
ArchiveManager selects usable archiver via archiver->supports(format, sourceType)
Archiver creates temp archive, Filesystem renames it to final target path
ArchiveCommand writes created path to IO output

use_cases.name: Archive Specific Package by Name/Version
use_cases.description: Developer specifies a package name (and optional version constraint) to archive
steps: ArchiveCommand::selectPackage() searches local + remote repositories via RepositorySet
VersionSelector picks best candidate if multiple matches found
ArchiveCommand::archive() calls archiveManager->archive(package, format, dest, fileName, ignoreFilters)
ArchiveManager downloads sources: downloadManager->download() + install() into temp dir
Reads composer.json from temp dir to override archive name/excludes
Archiver creates archive; temp source directory is cleaned up

use_cases.name: Select Archive Format
use_cases.description: Developer chooses output format: tar, tar.gz, tar.bz2, or zip via --format option
use_cases.notes: ZipArchiver supports: zip. PharArchiver supports: zip, tar, tar.gz, tar.bz2. ArchiveManager iterates archivers calling supports(format, sourceType) to pick one.

use_cases.name: Specify Output Directory and Filename
use_cases.description: Developer provides --dir and/or --file options to control output location and base filename
use_cases.notes: If --file is omitted, ArchiveManager::getPackageFilename() auto-generates name from package name, version, dist/source reference.

use_cases.name: Ignore Archive Filters
use_cases.description: Developer passes --ignore-filters to bypass .gitignore / archive.exclude patterns
use_cases.notes: Passed as `ignoreFilters=true` all the way to ArchiverInterface::archive()

use_cases.name: Skip Overwrite of Existing Archive
use_cases.description: If overwriteFiles=false and archive already exists at target path, return existing path immediately

use_cases.name: Dispatch Pre/Post Archive Events
use_cases.description: Plugin/script events fired before and after archiving when a Composer instance is present

key_classes.name: ArchiveCommand
key_methods: configure(): void — registers CLI args (package, version) and options (--format, --dir, --file, --ignore-filters)
execute(InputInterface, OutputInterface): int — entry point; dispatches events, delegates to archive()
archive(IOInterface, Config, ?string, ?string, string, string, ?string, bool, ?Composer): int — core orchestration
selectPackage(IOInterface, string, ?string): BasePackage|false — searches repos for best matching package

key_classes.name: ArchiverInterface
methods: archive(string $sources, string $target, string $format, array $excludes, bool $ignoreFilters): string

key_relationships: ArchiveCommand depends_on ArchiveManager (obtains via Composer or Factory)
ArchiveManager depends_on DownloadManager (downloads remote package sources)
ArchiveManager depends_on Loop (async resolution via SyncHelper::await)
important_notes: ArchiveCommand works with or without a composer.json (falls back to Factory::createConfig() and default repos)
Root package is archived from the current working directory; remote packages are downloaded to sys_get_temp_dir()
Archive name/excludes can be overridden via `archive.name` and `archive.exclude` in the package's own composer.json
getSupportedFormats() is hardcoded by archiver class (ArchiverInterface has no method for it)
buildExcludePatterns() prevents the output archive itself from being included in the archive
